2606.21496.title: Decoupling the Declarative from the Procedural in Vision-Language-Action Models
2606.21496.paper_summary: Deploying generalist robotic agents in the real world requires transferable skills. Specifically, a policy trained to clone a behavior from object-specific demonstrations must generalize beyond that object, otherwise data collection requirements become intractable. Recently, fine-tuning of pre-trained billion-parameter Vision-Language Models (VLMs), initially on large-scale robot datasets and then on fewer scenario-specific demonstrations, has emerged as the predominant paradigm for designing Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models. While these policies achieve state-of-the-art manipulation performance in-distribution, they remain brittle to minor spatial, semantic, and task variations. In this work, we address the inability of current models to decouple the declarative (i.e., concepts and entity semantics) from the procedural knowledge (i.e., how to do something) encoded in their parameters, which is a fundamental bottleneck for zero-shot skill transfer to novel objects. To address this, we propose w$^{2}$VLA, a new VLA model with restructured information flow. Rather than feeding all multimodal tokens from the VLM encoder into a large, opaque transformer-based action expert, our approach modulates the robot state sequence with visual, spatial, and skill information in a compositional and interpretable manner. Unlike popular, state-of-the-art VLAs, we show that our modular approach successfully decouples knowledge representations, enabling robust behavior cloning and unprecedented zero-shot skill transfer capabilities across dissimilar, unseen objects.
2606.21496.paper_summary_zh: 部署通用機器人代理於現實世界需要可轉移的技能。具體而言，從物體特定示範中訓練出來的策略必須能夠超越該物體進行概括，否則數據收集的需求將變得無法處理。最近，對預訓練的十億參數視覺-語言模型（VLMs）的微調，最初是在大規模機器人數據集上，然後在較少的場景特定示範上進行，已成為設計視覺-語言-行動（VLA）模型的主要範式。儘管這些策略在分佈內達到了最先進的操作性能，但對於輕微的空間、語義和任務變化仍然脆弱。在本研究中，我們解決了當前模型無法將陳述性知識（即概念和實體語義）與程序性知識（即如何做某事）從其參數中解耦的問題，這是對新物體進行零樣本技能轉移的根本瓶頸。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了w$^{2}$VLA，一種具有重構信息流的新VLA模型。我們的方法不是將來自VLM編碼器的所有多模態標記輸入到一個大型、不透明的基於Transformer的行動專家中，而是以組合和可解釋的方式調節機器人狀態序列，結合視覺、空間和技能信息。與流行的最先進VLA不同，我們展示了我們的模塊化方法成功地解耦了知識表示，實現了穩健的行為克隆和前所未有的零樣本技能轉移能力，適用於不同的、未見過的物體。
2606.21496.author: Nikolaos Tsagkas et.al.
2606.21496.authors: Nikolaos Tsagkas, Andreas Sochopoulos, Chris Xiaoxuan Lu, Oisin Mac Aodha, Alexandros Kouris
